ddls:
CREATE TABLE "offenders" (
  "offender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offender */,
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the arrest associated with the offender */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the offender */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the offender */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the offender */,
  "suffix" TEXT /* Suffix of the offender's name */,
  "alias" TEXT /* Alias or nickname of the offender */,
  "current_age" INTEGER /* Current age of the offender */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the offender */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the offender */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the offender */,
  "hair_color" TEXT /* Hair color of the offender */,
  "eye_color" TEXT /* Eye color of the offender */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the offender */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the offender */,
  "social_security_number" TEXT /* Social Security Number of the offender */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the offender */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the offender */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the offender */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the offender */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the offender */,
  "next_of_kin_name" TEXT /* Name of the next of kin */,
  "next_of_kin_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the next of kin */,
  "scheduled_release_date" TEXT /* Scheduled release date of the offender */,
  "release_status" TEXT /* Release status of the offender */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offenders_arrest_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrest_id") REFERENCES arrests ("arrest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charges" (
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charge */,
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the arrest associated with the charge */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case associated with the charge */,
  "charge_description" TEXT /* Description of the charge */,
  "arrest_code" TEXT /* Arrest code associated with the charge */,
  "bond_amount" REAL /* Bond amount required for the charge */,
  "offense_date" TEXT /* Date of the offense */,
  "arrest_date" TEXT /* Date of the arrest */,
  "arresting_agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agency that made the arrest */,
  "plea" TEXT /* Plea entered by the offender */,
  "trial_date" TEXT /* Date of the trial */,
  "sentence" TEXT /* Sentence given by the court */,
  "sentence_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sentence */,
  "sentence_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sentence */,
  "judge_name" TEXT /* Name of the judge */,
  "prosecutor_name" TEXT /* Name of the prosecutor */,
  "defense_attorney_name" TEXT /* Name of the defense attorney */,
  "court_case_number" TEXT /* Court case number */,
  "court_location" TEXT /* Location of the court */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charges_arresting_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("arresting_agency_id") REFERENCES arresting_agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charges_arrest_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrest_id") REFERENCES arrests ("arrest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charges_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the arrest associated with the case */,
  "case_number" TEXT /* Case number assigned by the court */,
  "court_type" TEXT /* Type of court handling the case */,
  "court_time" TEXT /* Time the case is scheduled in court */,
  "charge_status" TEXT /* Status of the charge in the case */,
  "hearing_date" TEXT /* Date of the hearing */,
  "hearing_type" TEXT /* Type of hearing */,
  "judgment" TEXT /* Judgment (e.g., convicted, acquitted) */,
  "fine_amount" REAL /* Fine amount if applicable */,
  "probation_status" TEXT /* Probation status */,
  "probation_end_date" TEXT /* End date of probation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_arrest_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrest_id") REFERENCES arrests ("arrest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arresting_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the agency */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agency */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the agency */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of agency */,
  "jurisdiction" TEXT /* Jurisdiction of the agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the agency */,
  "head_of_agency" TEXT /* Name of the head of the agency */,
  "agency_phone_extension" TEXT /* Phone extension for the agency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the booking location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the booking location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the booking location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the booking location */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of booking location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the booking location */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current number of occupants */,
  "security_level" TEXT /* Security level of the booking location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., officer, admin, court official) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource being accessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES arrests ("arrest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arrest_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the arrest associated with the image */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_height" INTEGER /* Height of the image in pixels */,
  "image_width" INTEGER /* Width of the image in pixels */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_taken_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who took the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrest_images_arrest_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrest_id") REFERENCES arrests ("arrest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arrests" (
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arrest */,
  "arresting_agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agency that made the arrest */,
  "booking_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the booking was made */,
  "arrest_date" TEXT /* Date of the arrest */,
  "arrest_time" TEXT /* Time of the arrest */,
  "arrest_location" TEXT /* Location of the arrest */,
  "arrest_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the arrest */,
  "arresting_officer" TEXT /* Name of the arresting officer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arrest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrests_arresting_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("arresting_agency_id") REFERENCES arresting_agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrests_booking_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_location_id") REFERENCES booking_locations ("location_id")
)
